learner_message: Last weekend I goed to the cinema and I taked many photos.
golden_teacher_response:
Great effort in sharing your experience! Just a couple of corrections: it should be "I went to the cinema" instead of "I goed," and "I took many photos" instead of "I taked." 

So, the correct sentence is: "Last weekend, I went to the cinema and I took many photos." 

Keep it up! What movie did you see?

learner_message: If I would have known about the meeting earlier, I would have prepared differently.

I see what you're trying to express, but the correct form for the conditional past in this case is: "If I had known about the meeting earlier, I would have prepared differently." 

Remember, when using the third conditional, you should use "had" in the if-clause, not "would have." Keep practicing!
